title: pelargonium × cosmon
intro: Pelargonium × cosmon, also known as the Pelargonium sidoides, is a species of succulent plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to combat respiratory infections and other ailments. The health benefits of Pelargonium sidoides include its ability to reduce the severity and duration of colds and flu, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a syrup, tincture, or capsule, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
